title: November 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 12''' is the 316th day of the year (317th in leap years). There are 49 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[John Hollis]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Carlos Ezquerra]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Lex Lang]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novel]] first published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – "[[Fast Friends]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair (TPB)]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Demolition]]'' released.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' novelization]] with [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] art hardcover published.
*2002 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones]]'' paperback published.
*[[2003]] – [[John Tartaglione]] dies.
*2003 – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 4]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2003 – [[Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: The Stark Hyperspace War'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Discount]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.1]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' is released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MacOS Mac].
*2010 – "[[Hunt for Ziro]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*2010 – ''[[Industrial Light & Magic: Creating the Impossible]]'' airs on [[wikipedia:Starz Encore|Encore]].
*[[2012]] – [[The Knight Errant Gazetteer|''Essential Atlas'' Extra: The ''Knight Errant'' Gazetteer]] online supplement to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2018]] – [[Stan Lee]] dies.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 1: The Mandalorian]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2019 – [[The Mandalorian: Chapter 1 (Original Score)|''The Mandalorian'': Chapter 1 (Original Score)]] released digitally.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 5|PlayStation 5]] released.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Under The Helmet: The Legacy of Boba Fett]]'' airs on Disney+.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Zen – Grogu and Dust Bunnies]]'' airs on Disney+.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic: The Lightsaber Collection]]'' to be published in the US.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase II – Quest of the Jedi Omnibus]]'' to be published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Prequel Trilogy – A Graphic Novel]]'' to be reprinted.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years - Droids & Ewoks]]'' to be published.
*[[2025]] – [[Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon 3|''Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror 3|''Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (2025) 7|''Star Wars'' (2025) 7]] published.
<noinclude>
